critical_issues.title: Staging slot MI role assignment targeted production data storage account
critical_issues.resolution: Added existing staging storage resource and changed role assignment scope/GUID seed to stagingDataStorageAccount.

critical_issues.title: PR had no committed file diff at review time
critical_issues.resolution: Committed and pushed INF-02 implementation files via report_progress.

suggestions.title: Smoke test may invoke wrong function due to list ordering
suggestions.resolution: Smoke test now targets a specific function name via SMOKE_TEST_FUNCTION_NAME workflow variable, with fallback to GetAndStoreYankeesRoster.

suggestions.title: Guard against accidental reuse of production and staging storage accounts
suggestions.rationale: Bicep module-level equality guard is better implemented in the calling deployment/pipeline validation layer; left as a follow-up configuration validation task.

suggestions.title: Add post-deploy validation for slot existence, sticky settings, and slot RBAC scope
suggestions.rationale: Outside INF-02 minimal scope because cd-infra.yml is a separate planned deliverable in REL-02.
